constructors.name: ShrinkWrapParameters
constructors.summary: Initializes a new instance of the ShrinkWrapParameters class

properties.name: FillHolesInInputObjects
properties.summary: Any input meshes will have "Fill Holes" applied to them before volume creation This value is ignored when input objects are Point Clouds

properties.name: InflateVerticesAndPoints
properties.summary: Inflate mesh vertices, points and point clouds Mesh vertices will be inflated as though the mesh were a point cloud

properties.name: Offset
properties.summary: Distance to offset outward or inward

properties.name: PolygonOptimization
properties.summary: 0 - 100 the percentage of optimization desired. Polygons will be reduced in areas of lower curvature Lower values result in better feature preservation at the cost of more polygons

properties.name: SmoothingIterations
properties.summary: Number of times to apply smoothing

properties.name: TargetEdgeLength
properties.summary: The desired target edge length in document units Smaller values equal more mesh resolution at the expense of larger mesh sizes
